title: DTPMP - Canada.ca
content:
This substance  was identified for action under the Chemicals Management  Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Phosphonic acid, [[(phosphonomethyl)Imino]bis[2,1-ethanediylnitrilobis(methylene)]]tetrakis-
None planned at this time
Publication of the final screening assessment.  The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 154, No. 14.
Publication and start of 60-day public comment  period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in  the Canada Gazette , Part  I: Vol. 153, No. 11 .
